# Bridger Western Wiki - Full Content Index

> Complete wiki for Bridger Western, a Roblox survival game set in Ridge B Valley. 2026 Alpha version. All content is verified from user-provided gameplay data and community analysis.

## Site Structure

### Homepage
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/
Content: Wiki navigation hub, Stand acquisition overview, key game mechanics summary

### Stands Section
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/
Content: Complete Stand database with tier classifications

**Stand Tiers (Verified):**
- S-Tier: The World, D4C, Killer Queen
- A-Tier: Star Platinum, TWAU, King Crimson, Star Platinum The World
- B-Tier: Tubular Bells, 20th Century Boy, Hierophant Green, Silver Chariot, Hermit Purple, Tusk Acts 1-3
- Tier Pending: Purple Haze, Mandom, Hey Ya

---

### How to Get a Stand
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/how-to-get-stand.html

**Method 1 - Arrow Shard Fishing:**
- Drop rate: 0.5%
- Guarantees a Stand when used
- Requires fishing rod and bait

**Method 2 - Corpse Part KOTH:**
- Requires 3+ players in server
- Triggered by loud sound + yellow beam in sky
- Success rate: 15-20% with proper holding time
- Left Arm specifically gives Tusk (10% chance)

**Water Method (Escape Tactic):**
- Grab Corpse Part immediately
- Mount horse, head to water
- Travel across water to avoid pursuers
- If stamina runs out, press S and move backwards at 20 speed

**Server Selection:**
- Choose less populated servers for solo attempts
- Use Discord coordination for populated server flooding

**Tusk Warning:**
- Causes permanent disability
- Cannot walk (crawl only)
- Cannot use weapons
- Requires legendary/mythical horse

---

### Stand Tier List
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stand-tier-list.html

**S-Tier Stands:**
- The World: Top-tier, clan monopolized, Meta Score 95/100
- D4C: Advanced mechanics, clan monopolized, Meta Score 93/100
- Killer Queen: High damage, clan monopolized, Meta Score 91/100

**A-Tier Stands:**
- Star Platinum: High damage output, Meta Score 82/100, 1% chance to evolve into SPTW
- TWAU: Versatile combat, Meta Score 80/100
- King Crimson: High skill ceiling, Meta Score 78/100
- Star Platinum The World: Evolution form, Meta Score 85/100

**B-Tier Stands:**
- Tubular Bells: Unique mechanics, Score 65/100
- Hierophant Green: Range and trap abilities, Score 72/100
- Silver Chariot: Fast attacks, high mobility, Score 70/100
- Tusk Acts 1-3: Nail attacks, mobility restrictions, Score 66/100
- 20th Century Boy: Defensive Stand, Score 64/100
- Hermit Purple: Utility-focused, Score 63/100

**Tier Pending (Unverified):**
- Purple Haze, Mandom, Hey Ya

---

### Stand Abilities & Skills
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/stand-abilities.html

**Stand Obtainment:**
- Obtained via CORPSE PARTS: When 3+ players, corpse parts have a chance to spawn (yellow beam). Grab and hold to absorb. Pulses indicate % chance of obtaining a stand (caps at 15-20%).
- Rarities: Default and Rare (time-manipulating).

**S-Tier Stands:**

**The World:**
- E: Barrage
- R: Shinei (autolock punch/mobility)
- T: Knife Toss
- G: Kick Barrage
- V: Long Timestop (~5 seconds)

**D4C:**
- Chop Barrage
- Tracking Chop
- Clone Spawn
- Clone Swap (lowers max HP)
- Dimension Hop (poncho required; taking >20 damage sends you to another dimension)
- Special Obtainment: 100 kills, 10 ks, in 'Deserts' area, knocked while corpse part spawns for 10% heart spawn chance

**Killer Queen:**
- E: Barrage
- R: Regular Chop
- T: Plant Bomb/Detonate Bomb
- G: Sheer Heart Attack (drains stamina)
- V: Stray Cat (air bubble bomb)

**A-Tier Stands:**

**Star Platinum:**
- E: Barrage
- R: Skull Breaker (decapitates at low hp)
- T: Star Finger
- V: Judgement
- G: Timestop Movement (While in timestop, press G to move in timestop)
- Evolution: Obtained with a 1% chance when using timestop movement with Star Platinum

**Star Platinum The World:**
- E: Barrage
- R: Heavy Punch
- T: Triple Bearing Shots
- G: Time Stop (2 Seconds)
- V: Grab Beatdown

**King Crimson:**
- E: Barrage
- R: Regular Chop
- T: Donut (impale)
- G: Epitaph (auto-dodge)
- V: Time Erasure (invis, iframes, speed boost)

**B-Tier Stands:**

**Gold Experience:**
- Life Giver (yellow bar)
- E: Barrage (7 page muda QTE)
- R: Life Giver Punch (inverts controls or summons tree/eagle/scorpions)
- T: Self/Other Heal
- V: Variant Switcher

**Gold Experience Requiem:**
- Currently no description

**Crazy Diamond:**
- E: Barrage
- R: Tracking Barrage
- T: Facial Reconstruction (10% chance to change face)
- G: Bearing Shot
- V: Restore Mode
- Blood Slash
- Reconstruction Barrage

**Tusk Acts 1-3:**
- Act 1: Nail Bullets, Nail Glide, Nail Jump
- Act 2: Wormhole Nails, Golden Ratio Nail
- Act 3: Wormhole Nails
- Press V to cycle between Acts
- Obtainment: ONLY OBTAINABLE AT A SMALL CHANCE FROM LEFT ARM CORPSE PART
- Passive - Cripple: Greatly reduced movement speed, cannot sprint, cannot use guns

**Hermit Purple:**
- Type: Utility Stand
- Grapple/Pull Target
- Chop/Dropkick

**Silver Chariot:**
- E: Barrage (with a rapier)
- R: Rapier Uptilt
- T: Lunge
- G: Whirlwind Slash
- Variant T: Ricochet Shot (LOW HP VARIANT)
- V: Armor Removal - Remove Silver Chariot's Armor, greatly increasing speed and damage of all moves

**Hierophant Green:**
- E: Tentacle Wire
- R: Emerald Splash
- V: Stand Pilot
- G: 20 Meter Emerald Splash - place down alot of tentacle wires, having your stand go invisible... fully automatic blasts

**Tubular Bells:**
- Type: Utility Stand
- E: Balloon Command
- R: Medium Balloons (Dog)
- T: Light Balloons (Snail)
- G: Heavy Balloons (Swan)
- V: TUBULAR BELLS!!! - Send out all your balloons at once towards your mouse cursor

**20th Century Boy:**
- Type: Utility Stand
- G: Absolute Defence - Crouch down and becom an impenetrable fortress, causing all attacks to be reflected back
- V: Dynamite Strap (requires 6 dynamite) - Pull some loose dynamite... attatching it to your body. Using absolute defence will negate self damage

**Tier Pending:**

**Hey Ya:**
- Type: Utility Stand
- Passive - Encouragement: Hey Ya will guide the user along the right path, giving them words of encouragment that supply buffs
- Buffs varying through dodges, damage buffs, healing, speed buffs, increased accuracy, etc

**Mandom:**
- Type: Utility Stand
- G: Time Rewind - Twist back your watch, returning you and everyone around you 6 seconds back in time. Includes states/health

**Unobtainable:**

**Whitesnake (UNOB):**
- Currently developer/admin only
- Can permanently steal stands
- Disc Extraction
- Stand Discs

---

### Corpse Part Guide
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/corpse-part-guide.html

**KOTH Mechanics:**
- Spawns randomly with 3+ players
- Announcement: "IT APPEARS ONCE AGAIN"
- Yellow beam visible in sky (~30 seconds)
- Probability increases the longer you hold

**Body Part Types:**
- Left Arm: Tusk (10% chance)
- All other parts: Random Stand

**Survival Tactics:**
- Water method for escape
- Horse mobility essential
- Avoid direct combat while holding

---

### Discord Coordination
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/discord-coordination.html

**Clan Strategies:**
- Server flooding: Fill server with clan members
- Turn-based: Clan members take turns holding Corpse Parts
- Area control: Block Corpse Part spawn zones
- Information sharing: Real-time spawn notifications

**Solo vs Clan Success Rates:**
- Solo players: ~5% success rate
- Organized clans: 80%+ success rate

---

### Stands FAQ
URL: https://bridgerwestern.cc/stands/faq.html

**Key Q&A:**
- Are there Stand Arrows? No traditional arrows. Arrow Shards exist via fishing (0.5%)
- Fastest method? Corpse Part KOTH with Discord coordination
- Can I change my Stand? No, Stands are permanent
- Tusk Acts abilities:
  - Act 1: Nail Bullets, Nail Glide, Nail Jump
  - Act 2: Wormhole Nails, Golden Ratio Nail
  - Act 3: Wormhole Nails
  - Press V to cycle between Acts
- Star Platinum evolution: Obtained with a 1% chance when using timestop movement with Star Platinum
- Hey Ya buffs: dodge, damage, healing, speed, accuracy (random activation)
- Time Stop counters: maintain distance, use mobility, position behind cover
- D4C special obtainment: 100 kills, 10 ks, in 'Deserts' area, knocked while corpse part spawns for 10% heart spawn chance
- Corpse Part mechanics: Pulses indicate % chance (caps at 15-20%). Rarities: Default and Rare (time-manipulating)

**Common Beginner Mistakes:**
- Getting Tusk without understanding permanent disability
- Fighting instead of escaping during Corpse Part events
- Not using Discord coordination
- Dropping Corpse Parts too early
- Joining empty servers (need 3+ players)
